entries.quote: What we did to high forex charges on cards way back in 2018 by introducing 'zero forex' cards, we will do the same to high forex charges on currency notes exchange in 2026 - i.e make it super transparent & affordable for consumers.
entries.signal: Niyo doubling down on currency-exchange market expansion with transparent, low-cost positioning; expanding from cards into physical forex—a direct competitive vector against travel-focused card offerings.
entries.belief: [Inferred · High] Management believes forex margin arbitrage in currency notes is ripe for disruption in 2026; treating physical-currency retail as core growth adjacency.
